summary: Plan-only remediation assessment using the provided cluster preflight artifact as live GitHub state. No merge, close, comment, label, or fix PR action is recommended because every seed PR is either draft, waiting on author, missing clean merge preflight/Codex-review proof, or has unresolved review status. One linked security-sensitive PR is routed centrally without blocking unrelated non-security classification.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked ref must be routed centrally, scoped only to that exact ref.
